description: Call GET /api/instagram/search-reels/v1 for Instagram Reels Search through JustOneAPI with keyword.

operations.description: Get Instagram reels Search data, including post ID, caption, and author profile, for tracking trends and viral content via specific keywords or hashtags and discovering high-engagement reels within a particular niche.

parameters.description: Access token for the API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The search keyword or hashtag to filter Reels.
parameters.name: keyword

parameters.description: Token used for retrieving the next page of results.
parameters.name: paginationToken
